pr.title: Build ReZilient mobile recovery ecosystem
pr.body: ## Summary - Keeps the existing pilot homepage architecture while upgrading the UI to a premium cinematic dark iOS-style dashboard with deep navy, charcoal, warm gold accents, gradients, glassmorphism, and subtle glow effects. - Adds a populated Today’s Focus card, recovery score, daily streak indicator, risk signal, motivational progress visuals, and a Spotify-style horizontal action carousel with realistic sample content. - Makes S.E.E. AI the homepage centerpiece with natural-language schedule/goals examples and visible conversion outputs for calendar events, transportation, reminders, tasks, and aftercare planning. - Expands in-home role switching across Client, Counselor, Sponsor, PO, Mentor, and Veteran without changing route architecture. - Polishes the floating emergency calm button and modal with native-feeling dark glass styling and realistic calm/support actions. - Updates the shared ReZilient logo mark to reflect the provided broken/rebuilt cinematic R direction with warm glow and the Break. Rebuild. Rise. wordmark treatment. ## Verification - `npm run build` passes. - `npx eslint src/pages/PilotHome.jsx src/components/pilot/home/HomeViewToggle.jsx src/components/pilot/home/ClientHomeView.jsx src/components/pilot/home/CounselorConnectedView.jsx src/components/commandCenter/EmergencyCalmMode.jsx --quiet` passes. - `npx eslint src/components/shared/ReZilientLogo.jsx --quiet` passes. - Repo-wide `npm run lint` still fails because of pre-existing unused-import errors in unrelated files outside this change.
pr.author: hasanigordon-afk
